title: trigger formatFromDbms
html:
trigger formatFromDbms

trigger formatFromDbms

System trigger for decrypting data for a field when reading from the database. Use when implementing secure systems.

Declaration:

trigger formatFromDbms

Applies to: Field
Activation: Activated when data for the field is fetched from the database. For more information, see Trigger Activation.
Default behavior: None
Behavior upon completion: None

Description

The formatToDbms and formatFromDbms triggers enable you to implement secure systems. These triggers must provide round trip (inverse) results; that is, the source data in the database at the start of the process should be the same as the result after decryption and encryption.

You can also use the formatFromDbms trigger to convert an unsupported DBMS data type into one that Uniface can handle. When formatting data for display, you can use the formatToDisplay and formatFromDisplay triggers.

Decryption can be done in either ProcScript or 3GL. In ProcScript, you can use $encode to encrypt data and $decode to decrypt data. For 3GL-based encryption, you can write a 3GL service for decryption and encryption and use the activate statement to activate it.

Trigger Activation

The formatFromDbms trigger is activated whenever data for the field is fetched from the database. When optimistic or cautious locking is in effect, this trigger is activated when the data is initially fetched and again when it is fetched and locked.

If formatFromDbms trigger contains ProcScript, it is activated for each field of an occurrence:

  • When an occurrence is fetched into the component as a result of the read statement in the read trigger for the entity.
  • By the write statement, immediately after the formatToDbms trigger is executed. This synchronizes the internal data representation with the database.
Related Links
  • $decode

    Decrypt or decode data, or verify a message by means of a digital signature.

  • trigger formatToDbms

    System trigger for encrypting data in a field when writing to the database. Use when implementing secure systems.

  • trigger formatToDisplay

    System trigger that temporarily converts the format of data in a field from an internal format into an external format that is displayed or printed.

  • trigger formatFromDisplay

    System trigger that temporarily converts the format of data in a field from an external format into an internal format, and makes that reformatted data available for processing purposes.

  • Call-Out From formatToDbms and formatFromDbms Triggers

    You can encrypt and decrypt data that is stored and retrieved from the database using the formatToDbms and formatFromDbms triggers of a field.
